heading: 7 Code
text: MOSAIC framework open source. implementation split across two repositories: R package handles data assembly, parameter sampling, Bayesian calibration, Python package runs metapopulation simulation engine.

heading: 7.1 Source repositories
text: MOSAIC-pkg — R package prepares data, samples priors, runs ensembles, computes importance-sampling weights, produces every figure table site. Function reference vignettes published institutefordiseasemodeling.github.io/MOSAIC-pkg.laser-cholera — Python metapopulation transmission engine, built LASER platform. MOSAIC-pkg calls reticulate.MOSAIC-data — processed inputs used MOSAIC-pkg. Raw inputs local-.open-meteo-pipeline enso-data — upstream climate-data pipelines feeding MOSAIC (see Data chapter).

heading: 7.2 Installation
text: complete walk-(R, Python, JAGS, geospatial dependencies) lives package’s Installation vignette. brief:
code:
# Install MOSAIC-pkg from GitHub
remotes::install_github("InstituteforDiseaseModeling/MOSAIC-pkg")

# Install the laser-cholera Python wheel into the R-managed environment
MOSAIC::install_dependencies()

# Verify
MOSAIC::check_dependencies()
